response:
I want 10 weaknesses of a company from 2023, and I want the 10 points to be similar to this example:  
1. [Company Name]'s earnings fell X% from 2019 to 2020.  
2. [Company Name]'s EPS decreased by $X in 2020 from the previous year.  
3. [Company Name]'s share prices declined by X% from 2019 to 2020.  
4. Entirely dependent on demand for a single product category.  
5. Total liabilities increased from $X to $X from 2018 to 2019.  
6. [Company Name] produced X% fewer units of its main product in the first half of 2020 due to reduced demand from a key industry segment.  
7. A competitor's [product line] sales increased by X% from 2019 to 2020, while [Company Name] has no comparable offerings.  
8. A competitor achieved a specific operational goal by 2020, while [Company Name] has not implemented similar practices.  
9. Sales to [Company Name]'s top ten customers represented approximately X% of their net sales during fiscal year 2019.  
10. [Company Name] faces multiple pending lawsuits in 2020, including charges related to [specific issue].
